description: systemd unit directives that sandbox services: PrivateDevices removes device access, PrivateTmp isolates /tmp, ProtectSystem=strict makes / read-only, ProtectHome=true hides /home.

cvss_vector_impacts.rationale: Service isolated from host filesystem, devices, and user data
Cannot access user home directories or arbitrary devices
Cannot modify system files outside designated directories

verification.method: Check systemd unit for sandbox directives
